TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Lavulan Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Lavulan a niyaro', 81 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 222 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 219 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 96%, Tayal 0.5%, Rukai 0.5%, Puyuma 0.5%, Paiwan 0.5%, roma 0.5%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɾab~vo~u~uɾan itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u ɾab~vo~u~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, tajaɾ *.*%, ro~u~ukai *.*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *.*%, paiwan *.*%, ro~uma *.*%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Lavulan Itiniay i Taoyuan Cen no Kaohsiung ko Lavulan a niyaro', 81 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 222 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 99% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 219 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 1% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 3 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 96%, Tayal 0.5%, Rukai 0.5%, Puyuma 0.5%, Paiwan 0.5%, roma 0.5%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ɾab~vo~u~uɾan itiniaj i tao~ujo~u~uan ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u ɾab~vo~u~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, tajaɾ *.*%, ro~u~ukai *.*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *.*%, paiwan *.*%, ro~uma *.*%. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
